task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'TESTS' document (or 'ReqView Verification Tests') is open and active in the main application view.

task_completion.description: Create a new test case object
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new row or object entry is visible at the bottom or within the list of the 'TESTS' document.

task_completion.description: Set the test description to 'Verify SRS-3 functionality'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Verify SRS-3 functionality' is clearly visible in the description or text column of the newly created test case.

task_completion.description: Create an upstream traceability link to requirement SRS-3
task_completion.visual_evidence: A link indicator (e.g., a badge, arrow, or text in a 'Links' or 'Upstream' column) pointing to 'SRS-3' is visible on the same row as the new test case.
The 'Save' button/icon is grayed out or disabled, or there is no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk '*') next to the project or document name in the title bar/tab.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView application GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the ReqView graphical interface, rather than a text editor (like VS Code or Notepad) modifying the TESTS.json file directly.

integrity.description: The traceability link was created using the application's linking feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The link to 'SRS-3' appears as a structured UI element (e.g., a colored badge or specific link column entry) rather than just being typed out as plain text in the description.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or command prompt windows are visible executing scripts or commands to inject the JSON data directly into the project files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is 'TESTS' (stored as TESTS.json). The new test case description must exactly match 'Verify SRS-3 functionality'. The upstream traceability link must point to requirement 'SRS-3' in the 'SRS' document.
